title: I3X API Response Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions for I3X API response formats

VQT.title: Value-Quality-Timestamp
VQT.description: Standard structure for time-series data values from a data source

value.description: The data value - can be any JSON type (primitive, object, array)

quality.description: Data quality indicator (e.g., GOOD, BAD, UNCERTAIN)

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the value was recorded

ObjectMetadata.title: Object Metadata
ObjectMetadata.description: Static metadata describing an object instance. Used by exploratory endpoints.

typeId.description: Reference to the object type definition

parentId.description: Parent element ID in the hierarchy (null or '/' for root)

isComposition.description: True if this element's value is composed of HasComponent children

ElementValue.title: Element Value
ElementValue.description: Value data for a single element, with optional nested children

data.description: Array of VQT values for this element (1 for current, N for history)

additionalProperties.description: Child elements (HasComponent relationships) keyed by elementId

ValueResponse.title: Value Response
ValueResponse.description: Response structure for value and history queries. Object keyed by elementId containing nested element values.

SubscriptionUpdate.title: Subscription Update
SubscriptionUpdate.description: Real-time update pushed via SSE stream or returned by /sync. Same structure as ValueResponse.

UpdateResult.title: Update Result
UpdateResult.description: Result of a write operation (PUT). Indicates success or failure with a message.

ValueResponse.title: Value Response
ValueResponse.description: Object keyed by elementId with nested element values

SubscriptionUpdateStream.title: Subscription Update Stream
SubscriptionUpdateStream.description: Individual updates sent via SSE stream (one JSON object per event)
